description: Register a GoogleSheetsResource wrapping the gspread client for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

gcp_credentials_env_var.label: GCP Credentials Env Var
gcp_credentials_env_var.description: Env var holding GCP service account JSON string

scopes.label: Scopes
scopes.description: OAuth scopes for the Google Sheets API
